childhood.familyBackground: Born in 1948 into an impoverished rural family in Sichuan province. One of four brothers (Liu Yongyan, Liu Yonghao, Liu Yongmei, Liu Yongxing) who would later become known as the 'Hope Brothers' — China's earliest private entrepreneurs after the Cultural Revolution.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1948년 쓰촨성 빈농 가정 출생. 4형제(류융옌·류융하오·류융메이·류융싱) 중 셋째. 문화대혁명 이후 중국 최초의 민영 기업가 '시왕(希望) 형제'로 알려짐.
childhood.education: Graduated from Sichuan's Xihua University (formerly Chengdu Agricultural Machinery College) in 1968 with a degree in engineering.
childhood.earlyLife: Born June 20, 1948. Grew up during China's Cultural Revolution era in extreme poverty. The four Liu brothers pooled 1,000 yuan in 1982 to start a quail and pig farming business in rural Sichuan, which became the seed of the Hope Group — one of China's first major private enterprises.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1948년 6월 20일 출생. 문화대혁명 시기 극빈 환경에서 성장. 1982년 4형제가 1,000위안을 모아 쓰촨에서 메추리·양돈 사육업 시작 — 중국 최초 대형 민영기업 '시왕그룹'의 시초.

careerTimeline.event: Co-founded Hope Group with three brothers — started with quail and pig farming in Sichuan with 1,000 yuan
careerTimeline.eventKo: 4형제와 시왕(希望)그룹 공동 창업 — 1,000위안으로 쓰촨에서 메추리·양돈 사육 시작

careerTimeline.event: Split from brothers; founded East Hope Group (东方希望集团) focusing on animal feed and heavy industry
careerTimeline.eventKo: 형제와 분리, 동방시왕그룹(东方希望集团) 설립 — 사료·중화학 공업 집중

careerTimeline.event: Entered aluminum smelting industry — built massive aluminum production facilities in Xinjiang and Inner Mongolia
careerTimeline.eventKo: 알루미늄 제련 산업 진출 — 신장·내몽골에 대규모 알루미늄 생산 설비 건설

careerTimeline.event: East Hope became one of China's largest private aluminum producers; expanded into polysilicon and chemicals
careerTimeline.eventKo: 동방시왕 중국 최대 민영 알루미늄 생산업체 중 하나로 성장; 폴리실리콘·화학 사업 확장

careerTimeline.event: Ranked among China's top 10 richest; East Hope annual revenue exceeded 100 billion yuan
careerTimeline.eventKo: 중국 부자 10위권 진입; 동방시왕 연매출 1,000억 위안 돌파

careerTimeline.event: Forbes net worth $11.2B; East Hope Group spans aluminum, feed, polysilicon, chemicals, and real estate

failures.description: Split with brothers over strategic disagreements — dissolution of the original Hope Group partnership after 13 years
failures.descriptionKo: 13년간의 형제 동업 청산 — 전략적 의견 차이로 시왕그룹 분할
failures.lesson: Family partnerships require clear governance; Liu chose independent heavy industry path that ultimately proved more lucrative
failures.lessonKo: 가족 동업은 명확한 지배구조 필요; 류융싱은 독자적 중화학 노선을 택해 결과적으로 형제 중 최고 자산 달성

failures.description: Aluminum overcapacity crisis in China — East Hope's aluminum business faced severe margin compression as Chinese government cracked down on overproduction
failures.descriptionKo: 중국 알루미늄 과잉생산 위기 — 정부 규제 강화로 동방시왕 알루미늄 사업 마진 급감
failures.lesson: Diversified into polysilicon and downstream chemicals to reduce dependence on single commodity
failures.lessonKo: 단일 원자재 의존도 축소를 위해 폴리실리콘·정밀화학으로 다각화

quotes.text: We started with 1,000 yuan and four brothers. Everything we built came from the land.
quotes.textKo: 1,000위안과 4형제로 시작했다. 우리가 만든 모든 것은 땅에서 나왔다.
quotes.context: On the founding of Hope Group

personalTraits.knownFor: One of China's earliest private entrepreneurs (post-Cultural Revolution). Split from brothers to build East Hope Group into a heavy industry empire spanning aluminum, polysilicon, and chemicals. Known for frugality, long-term thinking, and aggressive vertical integration in commodity industries.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 문화대혁명 이후 중국 최초 민영 기업가 세대. 형제와 분리 후 동방시왕그룹을 알루미늄·폴리실리콘·화학 중화학 제국으로 성장. 절약·장기 사고·원자재 수직계열화로 유명.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Donated to rural education and poverty alleviation programs in Sichuan province; East Hope Foundation supports agricultural development in western China.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 쓰촨성 농촌 교육·빈곤 퇴치에 기부; 동방시왕재단 서부 중국 농업 발전 지원.
personalTraits.controversies: Environmental concerns over aluminum smelting operations in Xinjiang and Inner Mongolia; questions about labor practices in remote industrial facilities.
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 신장·내몽골 알루미늄 제련 공장의 환경 문제; 오지 산업시설 노동 환경 논란.
